name: Nutty Brown Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 190°C,375°F, Gas Mark 5. Place all the dry ingredients in a large bowl and mix well. Add the egg and milk and mix well with a spoon. Pour into a 1-pint non-stick loaf tin, smooth over lightly, sprinkle with sunflower seeds (optional), and bake for 45 to 60 minutes or until crisp on top and it leaves a skewer clean if speared.
